backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Product catalog with CRUD operations (initialize, getProducts, getProductById, addProduct, updateProduct, deleteProduct) backed by an in-memory Map, seeded with four Gopi skirt products.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (homepage, visual theme, product catalog display) to their corresponding frontend source files and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and hook responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the DivyaVastra React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the single-page storefront by returning the HomePage component directly.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying the DivyaVastra brand story and three feature cards (Crafted with Love, Premium Quality, Festive Elegance) with gold-accented icons on a dark crimson background.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Product grid section that renders skeleton loading cards, error/empty states, or a responsive 4-column grid of ProductCard components from backend data.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Multi-column footer with brand info, social media links (Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp), quick navigation links, and contact details on a dark background with a decorative gold gradient band.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Shop Now' CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu for the DivyaVastra site.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-width hero banner section with a background image, overlay gradient, brand name, tagline, description, and CTA buttons linking to the collection and about sections.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Displays a single product with its image, category tag, availability badge, name, description, INR-formatted price, and an 'Add to Cart' button.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context and custom hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports useProducts (fetches product list from the backend actor) and useInitialize (mutation to seed initial products) using React Query.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines the DivyaVastra warm Indian color palette as CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main page component that composes Header, HeroSection, FeaturedProducts, AboutSection, and Footer, and auto-initializes backend products if none are loaded.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the DivyaVastra frontend, defining custom fonts (Playfair Display, Cinzel, Lato), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, warm/gold box shadows, and keyframe animations including accordion and shimmer effects.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking DivyaVastra's build progress, including completed features (homepage, Indian aesthetic theme, product catalog display) and one pending backend task (AR-3) to create a clothing product data model seeded with sample Gopi skirt products.
